object_a.label: floor pattern
object_a.description: medium-brown hardwood flooring in kitchen/dining area
object_a.long_form_open_description: Warm medium-brown hardwood (or wood-look) planks extending through the middle of the scene into the kitchen/dining zone; visible grain and plank seams; contrasts with foreground carpet and marks the open-plan transition.

object_b.label: floor pattern
